rationale: The exact DOI match (10.1509/jmr.13.0050) confirms the citing paper directly references this specific JMR study. Based on the notes, both papers model visit and purchase/conversion processes with carryover dynamics using individual-level multichannel data and MCMC, and the citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending prior online-focused work—making this a plausible methodological/foundational comparison rather than an incidental mention.
